productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Brown Casual Shoes
description: An absolutely cool casual shoe, this pair from numero uno is a great addition to your wardrobe. The all brown uppers with beige and camel accents in an updated design creates a strong impression. Team this with jeans and t-shirts for great urban style.UpperSynthetic leather upper for durability and comfortSuede toe counter for greater protection to the toePanel detailing on the sides for greater styleLace-ups for a snug FitCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for added comfortBrand name embossed on the tongue MidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorption and all day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole in textured woven pattern on the forefoot and textured heel for maximum durability and tractionBuilt up heel counter for greater protection to the heelShoe careWipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
